response.justification: While the candidate meets the 15-year minimum experience requirement and possesses strong entrepreneurial and software craftsmanship skills, they lack the Director-level strategic scope and deep, recognized AI/ML expertise required for this Principal role. Their recent AI tooling experience is hands-on but does not demonstrate the enterprise-level strategic advisory or platform vision expected.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience
Entrepreneurial background with open-source platform creation
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling
concerns: Lacks Director-level strategic leadership and customer advisory experience
No advanced degree or recognized deep expertise in AI/ML
Scope is primarily hands-on full-stack rather than enterprise cloud/AI strategy
